ddls:
CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch job */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the batch job */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the batch job */,
  "job_status" TEXT /* Current status of the batch job */,
  "job_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the batch job */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the batch job in microseconds */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the batch job in microseconds */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the batch job in microseconds */,
  "operations_size" INTEGER /* Size of operations processed in the batch job */,
  "bytes_size" TEXT /* Size of data processed in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or cloud location of the server */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the server (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "server_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "server_type" TEXT /* Type of server (e.g., virtual, physical) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the server was created or added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding batch job */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., operations, bytes, duration) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., microseconds, bytes, operations) */,
  "operations_processed" INTEGER /* Number of operations processed during the batch */,
  "bytes_processed" TEXT /* Amount of data processed in bytes */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data or content of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., csv, pdf, json) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report generation (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the batch job associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., duration, resource usage) */,
  "threshold" TEXT /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "notify_users" TEXT /* Users to notify when the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., triggered, resolved) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the batch job associated with the log */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the logged event */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "event_category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., system, application, security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource usage record */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the batch job associated with the usage */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server on which the batch job ran */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage percentage during the batch job */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage in MB during the batch job */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage percentage during the batch job */,
  "network_usage" REAL /* Network usage (e.g., bytes sent, bytes received) during the batch job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_usage_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_usage_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)
